text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
We have Mia the black cat, Emma the bear cub,
Nicole the squirrel, and Lola the elephant...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, what do you think would be a good name?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
"For what?" My new stuffed animal's name, that's
what! It has to sound like a bunny name, be cute,
and easy to say. ♪ Got it?
